title: Verdalia
description: A Vanilla++ farming and Create experience!
body:
![Verdalia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5d6b7e798d3604d6e4d862c69405c693e3204d5.png)

# A Lush Vanilla++ Survival and Building Experience

---

Verdalia expands Minecraft without changing what it is. The world is larger, the visuals are improved, and more systems are added for farming, building, and progression. Everything is designed to stay close to vanilla while making the game feel more complete.

---

## 🌿 World

- Tectonic and Terralith terrain  
- Seasons and weather  
- Light temperature system  
- Improved sounds, lighting, and animations  

---

## 🏛 Structures

- YUNG’s structure overhaul  
- More variation and better layouts  
- Still vanilla-style  

---

## 🚜 Farming

- Full Let’s Do mod set  
- Crops, cooking, and brewing  
- Farming plays a bigger role in survival  

---

## ⚙ Create

- Automation through Create  
- Useful for farms and large builds  
- Optional, but scales well in long-term worlds  

---

## 🏗 Building

- More blocks and decoration  
- Furniture and building tools  
- Designed for aesthetic builds  

---

## ⚔ Combat

- Better Combat  
- Smoother animations  
- Same core mechanics  

---

## 👥 Multiplayer

- World Host (invite friends directly)  
- No server setup required  

---

## ⚡ Performance

- Optimized Fabric setup  
- Runs well with shaders  

---

Verdalia focuses on making the game feel better to play over time, especially for long-term worlds.
